    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model with parameters of type Card
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Tribe.addCard(Player player, Card card)
    Adds a card to the tribe, delegating to the card's own placement logic (which routes it to the characters or the buildings).
    void
    Game.pickBonusCard(Player player, Card bonusCard)
    Resolves the end-of-round bonus pick by delegating to the current state.
    default void
    GameState.pickBonusCard(Game game, Player player, Card bonusCard)
    Resolves the optional end-of-round bonus pick.
    Method parameters in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model with type arguments of type Card
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Board.dealInitialCards(List<Card> tribeDeck, int numPlayers)
    Deals the opening rows.
    void
    Game.pickCards(Player player, List<Card> selectedCards)
    Resolves a player's card pick by delegating to the current state.
    default void
    GameState.pickCards(Game game, Player player, List<Card> selectedCards)
    Resolves a player's card pick for the offer tile their totem sits on.
    Era
    Board.refillUpperRow(List<Card> tribeDeck, Era currentEra)
    Refills the upper row from the deck after a round.

  • Uses of Card in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.states

    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.states with parameters of type Card
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    BonusCardSelectionState.pickBonusCard(Game game, Player player, Card bonusCard)
    Resolves the bonus pick: validate the chosen card, charge its cost and add it to the player's tribe, then continue with event resolution.
    Method parameters in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.states with type arguments of type Card
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ActionResolutionState.pickCards(Game game, Player player, List<Card> selectedCards)
    Resolves the active player's action for the tile their totem occupies.
